title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at New India Assurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, New India Assurance in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About New India Assurance:
New India Assurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with New India Assurance!
